prompt: {argument name="aesthetic" default="Japanese negative film"} aesthetic, {argument name="setting" default="convenience store scene at dusk"}, mixed cool indoor light and warm outside light, slight highlight bloom, low contrast, muted colors, subtle grain, {argument name="subject" default="subject standing in front of refrigerator section, casually reaching for a drink"}, body slightly leaning, relaxed posture, soft unfocused expression, reflections on glass door, imperfect composition, quiet mundane atmosphere, nostalgic everyday life --2:3
translatedPrompt: {argument name="aesthetic" default="日系负片胶片感"} 美学，{argument name="setting" default="黄昏时的便利店场景"}，室内冷光与室外暖光交织，轻微的高光溢出，低对比度，低饱和度色彩，细腻的颗粒感，{argument name="subject" default="人物站在冷柜前，随手拿取饮料"}，身体微微前倾，姿态放松，神情柔和而失焦，玻璃门上的倒影，不完美的构图，安静平凡的氛围，怀旧的日常生活 --2:3

breakdown.creativeCore: 日系负片胶片感：捕捉日式便利店中怀旧、日常的氛围，采用负片胶片美学，呈现柔和的光影与低饱和度的色彩。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: low contrast]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
